ksa_text: Skill in building, managing, and operating a Data Governance Council, including membership design, decision authority, meeting cadence, agenda management, issue escalation, decision documentation, and multi-stakeholder conflict resolution.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-S-004 (DG, Skill) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4261 is insufficient to establish relevance to financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.426, eu_ai_act=0.417, nice=0.409) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4261 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DG-domain KSA DG-S-004 (composite 0.4261) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4261 for DG domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DAMA DMBOK governance competencies; governance awareness at practitioner level appears in O*NET 15-2051 expanded skill sets. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Financial Risk Specialist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DG domain KSA at composite 0.4261 is not a standard requirement for Financial Risk Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4261, domain DG, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
